message:
fix(console,observability): ANSI default color and histogram sum overflow

Two bugs found during fresh-eyes code audit:

1. console.c: emit_ansi_start skipped foreground color code when
   fg == ASX_COLOR_DEFAULT (value 9), emitting no color at all.
   ANSI code 39 means "default foreground" and should be emitted
   to properly reset color. Fix: always emit the fg code (30-37
   for named colors, 39 for default).

2. observability.c: metrics_observe histogram sum used unchecked
   int64_t addition, which is undefined behavior on overflow per
   C standard. Fix: add saturation arithmetic — clamp at
   INT64_MAX/INT64_MIN instead of wrapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
